title: Club Founded
description: Liverpool FC was founded on 3 June 1892 by John Houlding after a dispute with Everton FC over the rent at Anfield stadium. The club was admitted to the Football League Second Division that same year.

title: First League Title
description: Liverpool won their first ever Football League championship, finishing the season as champions of the First Division under manager Tom Watson.

title: Shankly Arrives
description: Bill Shankly was appointed manager on 1 December 1959. He transformed Liverpool from a Second Division side into one of the greatest clubs in Europe, laying the foundations for decades of success.

title: First Shankly Title
description: Under Shankly, Liverpool claimed their first league title in 17 years, beginning an era of dominance in English football. The famous Kop terrace at Anfield became the spiritual home of football fandom.

title: First European Cup
description: Bob Paisley led Liverpool to their first European Cup triumph, defeating Borussia Mönchengladbach 3–1 in Rome. Terry McDermott, Tommy Smith and Phil Neal scored the goals in a historic night.

title: European Cup Hat-trick
description: Joe Fagan guided Liverpool to an unprecedented treble — league title, League Cup and European Cup — in his first season as manager. They beat Roma on penalties in the final in the Eternal City.

title: Hillsborough Disaster
description: On 15 April 1989, 97 Liverpool supporters lost their lives in a crush at Sheffield Wednesday's Hillsborough stadium during an FA Cup semi-final. The tragedy united the city and the club forever. Justice was served in 2016.

title: Miracle of Istanbul
description: Perhaps the greatest night in the club's history. 3–0 down at half-time against AC Milan in the Champions League final, Liverpool scored three goals in six second-half minutes. Steven Gerrard led the comeback and Jerzy Dudek saved two penalties to win the cup on 25 May 2005.

title: Klopp Era Begins
description: Jürgen Klopp was appointed Liverpool manager on 8 October 2015, describing his approach as 'heavy metal football'. He would go on to become the most successful manager in the club's history.

title: Champions of Europe Again
description: Klopp's Liverpool defeated Tottenham Hotspur 2–0 in Madrid to lift a sixth European Cup. Mohamed Salah scored from the penalty spot before Divock Origi sealed the victory, ending a 14-year wait.

title: World Champions
description: Liverpool became FIFA Club World Cup champions for the first time, defeating Flamengo 1–0 in Qatar thanks to a Roberto Firmino extra-time winner. The Reds were crowned the best club on the planet.

title: Premier League Champions
description: Liverpool ended a 30-year wait for the league title, clinching the Premier League with seven games to spare — the fastest title win in Premier League history. Klopp's side finished on 99 points in the prior season, setting the stage for glory.

title: Klopp's Farewell
description: Jürgen Klopp announced his departure from Liverpool at the end of the 2023/24 season after nine transformative years. He signed off with a League Cup triumph, leaving behind a legacy of trophies, memories and unconditional love from the Anfield faithful.

title: Slot Takes Charge
description: Dutch coach Arne Slot succeeded Klopp in the summer of 2024, arriving from Feyenoord. He quickly settled into life at Anfield, guiding Liverpool to the top of the Premier League in his debut season.
